meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-07-13 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: A strong night to open the week: 8h00 at score 87 off a 22:08 bedtime — 25 minutes over the 7-day average (7h35) and the best score in a week. Deep recovered to 1h13 and awake time fell to just 9 minutes, lifting quality firmly into the good band. The autonomic picture jumped: HRV rose to 45 (+8 vs the previous night and well above the 39 average), RHR eased to 53, and morning stress was very low at 14. Stage mix was light-led — 5h07 of light — with REM 1h40. Nights are labeled by the evening they start, so this one sits under Sun 12 (Sunday–Monday), following Sunday's easy 1 km pool swim. Readiness is high and the training week has clearly been absorbed. A good platform to open Monday with an easy swim.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.today: Danas: plivanje u bazenu (lagana tehnika / aerobno)
hr.rec: Snažna noć za početak tjedna: 8h00 uz ocjenu 87 i lijeganje u 22:08 — 25 minuta iznad 7-dnevnog prosjeka (7h35) i najbolja ocjena u tjednu. Duboki san oporavio se na 1h13, a budnost je pala na samo 9 minuta, čvrsto podignuvši kvalitetu u dobar raspon. Autonomna slika je skočila: HRV je porastao na 45 (+8 vs prethodna noć i jasno iznad prosjeka od 39), RHR se spustio na 53, a jutarnji stres bio je vrlo nizak 14. Struktura vođena laganim snom — 5h07 — uz REM 1h40. Noći se bilježe prema večeri kojom počinju, pa ova stoji pod Ned 12 (nedjelja–ponedjeljak), nakon nedjeljnog laganog plivanja 1 km. Spremnost je visoka i trenažni tjedan je očito apsorbiran. Dobra osnova za početak ponedjeljka s laganim plivanjem.
